query:
SELECT e.expenseDate, ec.name as category, e.amount, e.notes, e.vendorName
FROM expenses e
JOIN expense_categories ec ON ec.id = e.categoryId
WHERE e.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY e.expenseDate, ec.name;
command:
